TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Lorenzo_Brown, title = Lorenzo_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lorenzo_Brown} }

S.FORM: Lorenzo Brown hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw / p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1990, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 8, Lorenzo Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Lorenzo Brown hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw / p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1990, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 8, Lorenzo Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: lorenzo βrown ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaras~ɕ mariʔ taj s~ɕuruw / pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ taj s~ɕuruw. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, lorenzo βrown, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
